case_title: NOEL REGINA CASSIDY VS. AIR BNB, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,146.64 FILED BY CASSIDY, NOEL REGINA AS TO DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASSIDY, NOEL REGINA AS TO DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
(SC-109)AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -FERNANDA CADAMBI TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF AIRBNB/POS ATTACHED FILED BY DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC.
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL 3/25/22 SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASSIDY, NOEL REGINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC. $1,259.32 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 INTEREST, $84.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,449.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-19-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF NOEL REGINA CASSIDY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIR BNB IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY FERNANDA CADAMBRI, LEGAL INVESTIGATOR. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS DID NOT ARRIVE AT PLAINTIFF'S ADDRESS. CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO SEND EXHIBITS TO PLAINTIFF. PARTIES GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCES ARE EXTENDED TO THE MAY-19TH HEARING. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASSIDY, NOEL REGINA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00); PROOF OF SERVICE MARKED: "BY FAX" SERVED MAR-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AUTHORIZATION GIVEN BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT FOR THE CLERK TO SIGN THE JUDGE PRO TEM STIPULATION ON THEIR BEHALF.
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2022 BY CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF NOEL REGINA CASSIDY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT AIR BNB, INC. REPRESENTED BY FERNANDA CADAMBI, LEGAL INVESTIGATION ASSOCIATE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHITBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2022 - JUDGMENT.
